seoTitle: South Hurstville vs South Lismore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Hurstville and South Lismore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Hurstville vs South Lismore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Hurstville and South Lismore.
heading: South Hurstville vs South Lismore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Hurstville, New South Wales and South Lismore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to South Hurstville (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Hurstville or South Lismore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Hurstville has a flood risk score of 37/100, while South Lismore scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Hurstville scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. South Lismore scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Hurstville or South Lismore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
